title: Unblock Indicator - Infoblox NIOS
content:
This playbook unblocks the given Indicator by deleting its RP Zone rule from Infoblox NIOS platform.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Infoblox Inc. pack (Infoblox, partner-supported).

Use cases: Network Security.

Inputs — indicator: The indicator to unblock.; target_rp_zone: The target Response Policy Zone..

Integrations/scripts used: Set, infoblox-delete-rpz-rule, infoblox-search-rule.

description: This playbook unblocks the given Indicator by deleting its RP Zone rule from Infoblox NIOS platform.

        simple: record:rpz:cname
      rule_name:
        complex:
          root: ExtractedIndicators
          accessor: Domain
          transformers:
          - operator: concat
            args:
              prefix: {}
